inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places in the rounded result

formulas.unroundedResult: operation==1 ? operandA+operandB : operation==2 ? operandA-operandB : operation==3 ? operandA*operandB : operation==4 ? operandA/operandB : 0
formulas.roundedResult: roundingMode==0 ? Math.round(unroundedResult * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : roundingMode==1 ? Math.floor(unroundedResult * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : roundingMode==2 ? Math.ceil(unroundedResult * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : Math.trunc(unroundedResult * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
